style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="Route requests to apps" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="35" width="50" x="310" y="168" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="13" parent="1" style="rounded=1;html=1;fillColor=#E8D9FF;strokeColor=#B57AF5;fontColor=#1A1325;labelBackgroundColor=none;" value="User Browser
HTTPS Request" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="160" x="120" y="305" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="14" parent="1" style="rounded=1;html=1;fillColor=#E8D9FF;strokeColor=#B57AF5;fontColor=#1A1325;labelBackgroundColor=none;" value="Cloudflare Edge

Build Docker Image" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="180" x="430" y="480" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="19" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#DCE4F2;strokeColor=#7C93B8;" value="GHCR
Docker Image Registry" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="200" x="840" y="480" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="20" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#DCE4F2;strokeColor=#7C93B8;" value="Delivery Repo
(docker-compose + deploy.yml)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="200" x="435" y="710" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="21" edge="1" parent="1" source="23" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;" target="19"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="22" connectable="0" parent="21" style="edgeLabel;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];" value="Docker pull image" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.04" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="23" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E6E7EB;strokeColor=#8D919B;fontColor=#181A1F;" value="Self Hosted Runner
(Home Server)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="200" x="840" y="710" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="24" edge="1" parent="1" source="13" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;endArrow=block;strokeWidth=2" target="14" value="HTTPS request"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.0034" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="25" edge="1" parent="1" source="14" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;endArrow=block;strokeWidth=2" target="15" value="Route via tunnel"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="26" edge="1" parent="1" source="16" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;endArrow=block;strokeWidth=2" target="4" value="Forward request"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="27" edge="1" parent="1" source="17" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;endArrow=block;strokeWidth=2" target="18" value="Push code"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="28" edge="1" parent="1" source="18" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;endArrow=block;strokeWidth=2" target="19" value="Build and push image"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="29" edge="1" parent="1" source="18" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;endArrow=block;strokeWidth=2" target="20" value="Update deployment config"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="540" y="600" /> <mxPoint x="540" y="600" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="30" edge="1" parent="1" source="20" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;endArrow=block;strokeWidth=2" target="23" value="Trigger deployment"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="31" edge="1" parent="1" source="23" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;endArrow=block;strokeWidth=2" value="Run docker compose"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.3962" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="1340" y="750" /> </Array> <mxPoint x="1340" y="560" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="32" edge="1" parent="1" source="15" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;endArrow=block;strokeWidth=2" target="16" value="Tunnel connection"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="850" y="250" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
